> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add redis/agent-skills --skill redis-vector-search --skill redis-semantic-cache -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/redis-vector-search`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/redis-vector-search.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add redis/agent-skills --skill redis-vector-search --skill redis-semantic-cache -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

HNSW vs FLAT, vector index config, hybrid search, RAG retrieval with RedisVL. Official Redis agent skills for AI coding agents working with Redis. Follow agentskills.io.

## Install Prerequisites

Install (core example): `npx skills add redis/agent-skills --skill redis-core -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` ; additional for vec/sem via bundle. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[redis/agent-skills](https://github.com/redis/agent-skills) (official redis.io, MIT)

## Comparable Alternatives

Other cache/KV skills, vector DB skills (pgvector etc).

&gt; Web 2026 from redis/agent-skills.
